title: The Princess Is Revealed
description: On pages 0–7, the princess is revealed as baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase.
scene: The Princess Is Revealed. Baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: A dragon lives at enoshima. the mythical beast closest to being a god. that is a dragon. I WONDER HOW A DRAGON WOULD TASTE LIKE?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: to be beaten to this extent by a single pirate swordsman...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: As proud members of Baroque works entrusted specially by the boss to watch over this town,
